title: Warm Irish Potato Crumble
description: Fresh, crumbly, indulgent Irish dish featuring coconut creme fraiche, a papillote style technique, and dairy-free-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C and line a baking dish with parchment.
In a large pot, boil the diced potatoes until tender, about 10 minutes, then drain.
While the potatoes cook, whisk together coconut creme fraiche, coconut milk, flour, brown sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Gently fold the potato mash into the cream mixture, adding fresh thyme and half the walnuts.
Transfer the mixture to the prepared baking dish and sprinkle the remaining walnuts on top.
Bake on the middle rack for 20 minutes until the top is golden brown and the edges bubble.
Let the crumble rest for 5 minutes to set before serving.
Spoon onto plates and drizzle with a dollop of dairy-free creme fraiche if desired.
Garnish with extra thyme leaves for a fresh finish.
Serve warm as a comforting dessert for a cozy gathering.
